meta.title: ngodingopi — Freelance IT Web App Development
meta.description: We build modern, performant web applications tailored to your business needs. From landing pages to full-stack platforms.

hero.title: We Build Digital Products That
hero.description: From concept to deployment — we build websites, apps, and POS systems that help businesses grow. Clear communication, reliable delivery.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: We specialize in building digital products that help your business grow

items.title: Website
items.description: From single-page landing sites to full multi-page platforms. Company profiles, portfolios, blogs, e-commerce — responsive, fast, and SEO-ready.

items.title: App
items.description: Mobile and web applications for iOS, Android, and browsers. Dashboards, booking systems, CRM, SaaS — built cross-platform from a single codebase.

items.title: POS
items.description: Point of Sale systems for retail, F&B, and service businesses. Manage transactions, inventory, and reporting — all in one place.

portfolio.title: Our Clients
portfolio.subtitle: Businesses that trust us with their digital products

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The person behind ngodingopi
about.description: Hi, I'm Yobel — a developer with work experience across 4 countries. Now I'm putting that experience to work helping businesses build great digital products. Clear communication, delivered on time.

values.title: Quality Over Quantity
values.description: I take on limited projects at a time so I can give each one my full attention and deliver my best work.

values.title: Straight Communication
values.description: No jargon, no ghosting. You'll always know where your project stands and what's coming next.

values.title: Fast Turnaround
values.description: I use modern tools and frameworks to deliver quality work efficiently — so you get your product faster without sacrificing quality.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's chat about it on WhatsApp.
contact.waMessage: Hi, I'm interested in your web development services. Can we discuss my project?
contact.response: We typically respond within a few minutes

footer.description: Building modern web applications for businesses that want to grow.
